thought.text: 我将对比唯一失败样例的输入输出定位语义差异。

action.command: d=/workspace/YatCC/build/test/task3/functional-3/056_short_circuit.sysu.c; echo score; cat $d/score.txt; echo 'answer out/err/return?'; for f in answer.out answer.err output.out output.err answer.return output.return answer.compile output.compile; do echo ===$f===; cat $d/$f 2>/dev/null || true; done; echo 'source'; sed -n '1,120p' /workspace/YatCC/test/cases/functional-3/056_short_circuit.sysu.c; echo 'output ll relevant'; grep -n "define.*func\|define.*main\|logic\|if\.then\|_sysy_putint\|call" $d/output.ll | sed -n '1,200p'

tool_call.name: terminal
tool_call.arguments: {"command": "d=/workspace/YatCC/build/test/task3/functional-3/056_short_circuit.sysu.c; echo score; cat $d/score.txt; echo 'answer out/err/return?'; for f in answer.out answer.err output.out output.err answer.return output.return answer.compile output.compile; do echo ===$f===; cat $d/$f 2>/dev/null || true; done; echo 'source'; sed -n '1,120p' /workspace/YatCC/test/cases/functional-3/056_short_circuit.sysu.c; echo 'output ll relevant'; grep -n \"define.*func\\|define.*main\\|logic\\|if\\.then\\|_sysy_putint\\|call\" $d/output.ll | sed -n '1,200p'", "timeout": 120, "security_risk": "LOW", "summary": "Inspect failing short-circuit case outputs and IR"}

summary: Inspect failing short-circuit case outputs and IR
